title: AuditDelta
description: Output of the Audit Engine. Drives Window 3, the honest-gap display. Categorizes prediction-vs-data disagreements into the four canonical miss types from v9 docs. Designed to also serve as an exportable, citable audit record.

reproducibility_hash.description: SHA-256 over (prediction_hash + data_hash + audit_engine_version). Enables bit-perfect replay.

status.description: The four canonical miss types from cdv1/v9, plus 'match' and 'incompatible_units' as guardrails. 'numerical_miss' = topology matches, values off. 'topological_miss' = wrong shape entirely. 'out_of_scope' = substrate falls outside framework demand envelope. 'posit_grade_pending' = prediction depends on unverified posit.

confidence_score.description: Audit engine's confidence in the status classification.

topology_match.description: Does the predicted shape match the empirical shape? (Independent of numerical values.)

numerical_match.description: Do predicted values match empirical values within tolerance?

sigma_off.description: Disagreement in units of empirical uncertainty.

all_divergences.description: Complete list of disagreements, ranked by magnitude.

recommended_extension.description: If status is 'topological_miss', which v9 §Extension axis would close the gap?

data_provenance_echo.description: Echoes attribution from DataUpload so the audit record is self-contained. Required for citation.

show_ghost_locus.description: True for numerical misses: render fitted curve alongside predicted curve.

show_topological_residual.description: True for topological misses: highlight the shape difference.

show_hatching.description: True for out-of-scope: hatch the affected region.

show_dashed_band.description: True for posit-grade: render uncertainty band as dashed.

annotation_text.description: Brief verdict for display, e.g. 'Within tolerance' or 'Two-plateau aging not in catalogue — see hierarchical-kernel extension.'

exportable_record.description: Self-contained JSON record for the audit trail / gallery export. Includes everything needed to cite this audit independently.

title.description: e.g. 'Surface code distance-3, depolarizing, alpha_s audit'.

audit_bibtex.description: BibTeX entry for citing this specific audit.
